sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ الْمُسْلِمُونَ فِي الْعَالَمِ الْعَرَبِيِّ بِعِيدِ الْفِطْرِ بَعْدَ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani u arapskom svijetu slave Ramazanski bajram nakon mjeseca ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: Muslims in the Arab world celebrate Eid al-Fitr after the month of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَلْبَسُ الْأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَذْهَبُونَ لِزِيَارَةِ الْأَقَارِبِ وَالْجِيرَانِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca oblače novu odjeću i idu u posjetu rodbini i komšijama.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and go to visit relatives and neighbors.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ الْكِبَارُ "الْعِيدِيَّةَ" وَهِيَ مَبْلَغٌ مِنَ الْمَالِ لِلْأَطْفَالِ لِإِدْخَالِ السُّرُورِ عَلَى قُلُوبِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Odrasli daju 'bajramluk', što je određena suma novca djeci kako bi ih obradovali.
sentences.translationEn: Adults give 'Eidiya', which is a sum of money for children to bring joy to their hearts.

sentences.arabic: تَمْتَلِئُ الشَّوَارِعُ بِالزِّينَةِ وَالْفَرْحَةِ فِي هَذِهِ الْأَيَّامِ الْمُبَارَكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ulice su ispunjene ukrasima i radošću tokom ovih blagoslovljenih dana.
sentences.translationEn: The streets are filled with decorations and joy during these blessed days.
